subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast turned towards the Most Exalted Horizon! The sovereignty of Khosrow and the splendour of Parviz have been scattered to the winds, and no monarch remains [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من توجه الی الافق الاعلی سلطنت خسروی و حشمت پرویزی بباد رفت و هیچ شهریاری
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual transformation
